description: Letter from Shelomo b. Yehuda and nine other Jerusalemites confirming the receipt of ten dinars from Fustat. Dating: approximately 1030 (per Gil) and ca. 1025–1051 CE based on the years when Shelomo b. Yehuda served as Gaʾon. The letter bears the signature of every sender.
description_he: מכתב מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
